# harness_fme_feature_flag (Resource)

Create, update, and delete a Harness FME (Split) feature flag. Import id format: `org_id/project_id/flag_name`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Feature flag name (Split split name).
- `org_id` (String) Harness organization identifier.
- `project_id` (String) Harness project identifier.
- `traffic_type_id` (String) Split traffic type ID.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `tags` (Set of String) Tag names to associate with the flag (applied after create/update).

### Read-Only

- `flag_id` (String) Split internal flag ID.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
